chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3453 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.15316/2022 2. For hearing of main case 19.8.2025 None present for the petitioners -------------------------------- This is an old case of 2022, which is over three years ago. It was last taken up on 02.6.2022, which is over three years ago. Since then learned counsel for the petitioners has made no serious efforts to pursue this petition. Today, despite the lapse of three years, none present for the petitioners without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed / pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
